docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAMSKY, STEVEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELARDE, ALFREDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAMSKY, STEVEN $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00, THIS WAS AN ACCIDENT RESULTING IN A MINOR PROPERTY DAMAGE THAT OCCURRED AT A LOW RATE OF SPEED. PLAINTIFF HAD A PREEXSISTING BACK INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELARDE, ALFREDO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED ON DR. WILLIAM FISHKIN.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2008. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FOR BOTH SIDES RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VELARDE, ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT TAMSKY, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER. F. RAYRAY. THIS WAS AN ACCIDENT RESULTING IN A MINOR PROPERTY DAMAGE THAT OCCURRED AT A LOW RATE OF SPEED. PLAINTIFF HAD A PREEXSISTING BACK INJURY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAMSKY, STEVEN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
